title: Henry — fantasy-football roster names dump (Oct 2022)
html:
TL;DR

  • Seven-name dump from Oct 11, 2022 titled "Henry": Luke, Edgar, YG, Dinsdale (twice — likely both Dinsdale brothers), Ryan, Owen.
  • Likely a fantasy football roster-fill or bracket-seed scratch list — same crew as the June "Get Josh Allen" cheat sheet, minus ayden/kai/emilio/MQ but adding henry and Dinsdale.
  • The title "Henry" is the first-line-as-title pattern — Henry is a person, not a topic. Confirms henry is a named member of the 2022 Corvallis/Beaverton boys-roster, alongside Owen, Luke, Ryan, Edgar (likely Tio Edgar or peer Edgar), Dinsdale (twin friends per June cheat sheet).
  • henry is queued in Nov 20 thoughts as friend / single-mention; this Oct 11 capture promotes Henry to 2nd-mention within slice scope — stub-eligible.
  • "YG" is Yahir's self-handle in the list — confirms Yahir as both author and roster member.

Why it matters

Maps the fall-2022 inner-ring of names before henry becomes load-bearing in the March 2023 "billionaire's son Henry" dream. The dream-Henry resolution ("a council led by a billionaire and his son Henry vouches for character") hits differently when you know waking-life-Henry was a fantasy-football peer five months earlier — the dream may have been casting a real friend's name onto a billionaire's-son archetype. Stub-promotion threshold met (Henry now appears in 3+ summaries: this note, Nov 20 thoughts, March 2023 dream).

Open questions

  • Which Henry? (Last name not in vault; possibly a Brogden-era or Corvallis friend.)
  • "Edgar" — peer or Tio Edgar?
  • Is the doubled "Dinsdale" a typo or genuinely both twins from the cheat sheet?
